subject: Action needed: koi planning in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q2 review | INIT-5729
body: Here is a progress summary for the koi plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Katherine Johnson as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-5729. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: readiness, handoff.
